title: You know youre obsessed with NGE when thread
display_title: You know youre obsessed with NGE when thread
wikitext:
[]: "You know you're obsessed with NGE when" thread             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:39 pm I decided to create one of these, mostly because I looked down and noticed I was wearing Shinji's casual outfit. Anyway, when did you realize this was an obsession?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:41 pm The moment I joined [url]http://www.evamonkey.com[/url].

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:43 pm Hum... when I started searching about 50 google pages, looking for images of Evangelion, and... let me see.. when I started to be just like Asuka, you know, bitchy and bossy x.x

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:49 pm When you start to form correlations between Shinji and James Bond just from 1 similar shot.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:57 pm You know you are obsessed with Eva when... -You are always on this forum -Collect tons of merchandise -Buy all forms of the DVD collection. -Have from 20 gigs to 500 gigs to maybe even a terrabyte of Eva crap on your hard drive. Including Fan art, official art, wall paper, hentai, doujin, and hentai doujin.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 08, 2009 2:14 pm Your name is arron clark :P

[]:             Quote Post by Psychodrama » Thu Oct 08, 2009 2:43 pm When I read through ALL of the threads in the Evangelion Discussion forum.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Oct 08, 2009 2:59 pm -when you start noticing that songs you like can somehow fit in Eva themwise -when you make several key characters of the series in various video games with a Create a Character feature (I made a flawless Gendo in Rock Band 2, along with a fairly good Rei) -being a member of the forum -when you actually began to think of alternate theories, interpretations, conceptions, situations & stories for each character -when you're willing to shell $25 for a physical copy of one of the various soundtrack albums of the series (I plan to order "The Birthday of Rei Ayanami" around christmas time)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 08, 2009 3:12 pm You start analyzing characters in other completely unrelated stories in terms of "like Gendo, but..."

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Oct 08, 2009 3:24 pm You start to pour over certain aspects of a character’s personality and designs.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 08, 2009 3:33 pm ^ and reverse certain aspects to taste...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 08, 2009 3:49 pm Write fan fiction thats more real to you then the show

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:14 pm You have 4000 posts on EvaGeeks... ...uh-oh...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:26 pm When you have sat on an Eva panel with Eva Monkey himself "Loved it!" Took what you learned, ran your own Panel and got others hooked on it. You tend to see Eva in everything you do, all your friends have the personality's of the characters they cosplay as. You dream and like it more then the real world.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:28 pm If you have posters, statues, models, action figures, or anything Eva related hung around the walls of your "Geofront" (that's code for one's basement, bedroom)... If you know who "Shinjiko" is... If you've been on That Board... If you've faped to anything on That Board... If you perfer watching the sub over the dub... If you've joined this site... If you've answered yes to any of these then... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:30 pm When you've had a dream when you were Unit-01 during the Sachiel battle, and you were mad when the dream ended.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:31 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: You have 4000 posts on EvaGeeks...

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Oct 08, 2009 4:31 pm Holy Diver wrote: If you have posters, statues, models, action figures, or anything Eva related hung around the walls of your "Geofront" (that's code for one's basement, bedroom)... If you know who "Shinjiko" is... If you've been on That Board... If you've faped to anything on That Board... If you perfer watching the sub over the dub... If you've joined this site... If you've answered yes to any of these than... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 08, 2009 7:55 pm If you are at this very moment in time sitting in a dorm room with an Asuka cosplayer watching her attempt to eat chicken and failing while complaining to you about the sauce and telling you to do the dishes and take the trash out. If you went to an Anime club and one in a million they happen to show NGE and you sat and watched as others who have never seen the show gazed in confusion at what they were looking at.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Thu Oct 08, 2009 9:57 pm When you try to breathe Tang.
